data.title: Chili's Grill and Bar renew partnership with Spire Motorsports until 2026, sponsoring No. 77 Chevy ZL1 driven by Carson Hocevar.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 13, 2026, a popular restaurant brand and a growing race team have extended their sponsorship for the No. 77 Chevy ZL1, which is driven by Carson Hocevar. The partnership, which has captured the attention of NASCAR enthusiasts, involves promoting the brand through various engaging initiatives such as a country music video, a mechanical margarita shaker ride, and more. This collaboration signifies a significant expansion in their support for the racing team and highlights their commitment to connecting with a broader audience.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig advises Joint Lead Managers on Kuwait Finance House's $1 billion Sukuk issuance due 2031.
data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on January 13, 2026, legal representatives from Greenberg Traurig aided the Joint Lead Managers in Kuwait Finance House's (KFH) recent Sukuk offering of US$1 billion trust certificates set to mature in 2031. The issuance was facilitated by KFH Sukuk Company as part of its larger US$4 billion financial program...

data.title: Inventor from Sparta, Wisc., creates new mobile hunting shack with strategic windows for hidden hunting.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, an inventor from Sparta, Wisconsin shared his inspiration for creating a unique mobile hunting shack with strategic windows to facilitate discreet and quiet hunting. This innovative invention, known as the Specially Designed Hunting Shack, aims to provide hunters with a comfortable and warm shelter while out in the wilderness. The inventor's vision for the shack incorporates elements that enhance the hunting experience, making it an ideal choice for outdoor enthusiasts.

data.title: Medical Solutions CEO Rebecca Rogers Tijerino named to Staffing 100 NA list by SIA, marking her achievement in healthcare workforce.
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska on January 13, 2026, Medical Solutions, a top healthcare workforce partner, is excited to announce the recognition of their CEO, Rebecca Rogers Tijerino. She has been honored by Staffing as one of the notable individuals on the 2026 Staffing 100 North America list. This prestigious list acknowledges the most influential figures in the staffing industry. Tijerino’s inclusion highlights her leadership and impact in the sector.

data.title: Gas turbine market projected to reach USD 54.9 billion by 2032, growing at 8.49% CAGR. Valued at USD 13.38 billion in 2018.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, it was reported that the gas turbine market has shown robust and steady growth in recent years, underscoring its essential role in contemporary power generation and industrial uses. The market, which was worth approximately USD 13,379.41 million in 2018, has continued to expand significantly since then.

data.title: Smart Alert Tech unveils patented "non-event" notifications, a revolutionary home monitoring system, solidifying its place as an industry pioneer.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida today, on January 13, 2026, Smart Alert Tech has unveiled an innovative development in home monitoring and behavioral technology following the complete approval of its patented "non-event notification" system. Securing these patents marks a significant milestone for Smart Alert Tech, making it the pioneer in this field.

data.title: For the fifth year in a row, Snapology is named No. 1 Children's STEM Franchise in Entrepreneur's Franchise 500, showing sustained growth.
data.description: A popular children's franchise, Snapology, has been acknowledged for its continuous expansion, exceptional franchisee achievements, and role as a frontrunner in the STEAM category. The recognition was announced on January 13, 2026, in Dallas. Snapology is known for promoting STEM/STEAM education for kids, encompassing Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics. The franchise has been commended for its remarkable growth, franchisee success, and leadership in the STEAM sector.

data.title: Equinor secures 35 new Norwegian offshore licenses, awarded in Predefined Areas round, spanning North Sea, Norwegian Sea, and Barents Sea.
data.description: Equinor ASA recently announced securing additional acreage in the latest licensing round on Norway's continental shelf. The company has been awarded 35 new production licenses in the Awards in Predefined Areas round on the Norwegian continental shelf, encompassing key offshore regions such as the North Sea, the Norwegian Sea, and the Barents Sea. This development positions Equinor for future exploration and production activities. Of the 35 licenses obtained, 21 are specifically designated for the North Sea.

data.title: FinTech leader 100GROUP receives 2025 Fiserv/CardConnect Circle of Excellence Award for integrated payments & software platforms.
data.description: In Moorpark, California, 100GROUP has been honored with the prestigious 2025 Fiserv/CardConnect Circle of Excellence Award for its outstanding performance in integrated payments, software, and service. This award highlights the company's leadership in the industry and commitment to excellence.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's PE arm acquires majority stake in Olsson, Inc., an engineering firm with 2,000 employees and 35 offices.
data.description: Morgan Stanley's middle-market private equity arm has recently secured a majority investment deal with Olsson, Inc., an engineering firm. Morgan Stanley Capital Partners, a division of Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS), will be taking a majority stake in Olsson, which is a well-known employee-owned engineering and design company. As part of the agreement, Olsson employees will also be making a significant reinvestment, highlighting their collective commitment to the future growth of the firm. Established in 1956 in Lincoln, Nebraska, Olsson currently has over 2,000 employees spread across 35 offices throughout the United States. The company specializes in providing engineering design services, and this partnership is aimed towards enhancing its business prospects.

data.title: FDA finds no clear link between GLP-1 RAs and suicidal thoughts, but continues review due to limited data. Eli Lilly & Co. and Novo Nordisk drugs under scrutiny.
data.description: The FDA stated that a preliminary review has not shown evidence linking GLP-1 receptor agonists to suicidal thoughts or actions. Current prescribing information for GLP-1 drugs, like Eli Lilly's (LLY) and Novo Nordisk's (NVO), already includes warnings about these risks. The FDA is further investigating due to limited data and the seriousness of the issue. The agency reviewed reports from the FDA Adverse Event Reporting System regarding this matter. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Online training course on Supplier and Contract Manufacturer Management offered by ResearchAndMarkets.com on Feb 18-19, 2026; focuses on enhancing skills in supplier relationship management.
data.description: The training course "Supplier and Contract Manufacturer Management: Compliance, Qualification & Oversight" will take place from February 18th to February 19th, 2026. Hosted in Dublin, this program aims to improve participants' abilities in overseeing supplier relationships. It covers various aspects from supplier selection and approval to nurturing partnerships, risk evaluation, ongoing monitoring, and termination strategies. Interested individuals can find this offering on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

data.title: Sylvan Learning is ranked 98 on Entrepreneur's Franchise 500® List for franchise performance, investing in system, with continued growth.
data.description: Sylvan Learning, a top supplemental education provider, was recently acknowledged for its stellar franchise performance, significant system investment, and ongoing expansion efforts. As of January 13, 2026, the company continues to lead the way in offering enriching educational experiences for K-12 students. Sylvan Learning's commitment to quality education is highlighted through its continuous growth and dedication to providing top-notch services.

data.title: Inventor creates Saving Lives Shield (TKI-1259) in response to mass shootings worldwide, targeting various locations.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, a new innovative product called the Saving Lives Shield was unveiled. The inventor was inspired to create this product after witnessing numerous mass shootings occurring globally in various locations such as schools, churches, hospitals, military bases, and malls. The inventor expressed a strong motivation to mitigate the impact of such tragic events. The shield aims to enhance safety and potentially save lives in the event of an active shooter situation. This invention is a proactive measure intended to prevent harm, with the inventor emphasizing the importance of even potentially saving just one individual or more from such incidents.
